scripts.dev1: yarn workspace @trace/shared build && concurrently "yarn workspace @trace/server tsc --watch --noEmit --preserveWatchOutput" "yarn workspace @trace/server tsx watch src/dev.ts"
scripts.deploy:api: yarn workspace @trace/shared build && rm -rf projects/server/shared && cp -r projects/shared projects/server/shared && yarn workspace @trace/server build && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.build:ios: cd projects/app && npx eas-cli build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.submit:ios: cd projects/app && npx eas-cli submit --platform ios --profile production
scripts.build:android: cd projects/app && npx eas-cli build --platform android --profile production
scripts.submit:android: cd projects/app && npx eas-cli submit --platform android --profile production
